initial_message.description: Initial message shown to users when starting a chat

filters.description: List of search filters available for the project.

think_mode.description: Whether the project has the reasoning mode plugin enabled for deeper AI reasoning capabilities

is_private.description: Whether the project requires authentication to access

mcp_enabled.description: True if the MCP server integration is enabled for this project.

mcp_server_name.description: The name of the MCP server associated with this project.

mcp_metadata_tag.description: Metadata tag used to identify MCP-originated messages.
